description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build-and-test-laghos that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, checkout the repository in a subdirectory, install MPI, and then through a series of steps, install Hypre, Metis, and MFEM from source or cache, configure links between them, and finally build and test Laghos in multiple configurations.
